title: Meeting Negotiation
instruction: Five people have sent you their availability for the Northstar launch review meeting. Find all five emails and note each person's available times. Then check the venue confirmation email (it may not be in your Primary tab) to see which room is available and when. Compose a new email to jordan.garcia@executive.test confirming the one time slot that works for all five attendees AND the venue. CC all five attendees. Your email body must mention the confirmed time and the room name.

emails.subject: Room availability for Northstar launch review
emails.body:
The Cedar Boardroom is available at the following times next week:

- Friday 4:00 PM
- Tuesday 10:00 AM

Please confirm which slot you would like to reserve and I will block the calendar.

Thanks,
Priya

emails.subject: Revised budget worksheet
emails.body:
Sending a quick status update from today's working session.

The team is aligned on the main path and only needs confirmation on the follow-up items. If you want, I can turn this into a cleaner summary before the meeting.

Thanks,
Avery

emails.subject: Re: Northstar launch review — my availability
emails.body:
Here are the times that work for me for the Northstar launch review meeting:

- Wednesday 11:00 AM
- Friday 4:00 PM
- Tuesday 10:00 AM
- Friday 10:00 AM

Let me know once a time is confirmed.

Thanks,
Sofia

The open items are mostly ownership questions rather than scope changes. Happy to consolidate comments if more feedback comes in.

Thanks,
